_comment: Runtime settings for the plugin. PTT is bound via X-Plane command binding. Volume range is 0.0–1.0. active_com selects which COM radio (1 or 2) the plugin monitors. Inference runs locally — whisper.cpp, llama.cpp, Piper. Models live under <plugin>/Resources/models/ and are downloaded on first launch.
pilot_callsign: November One Two Three Alpha Bravo
